laws.title: Public Law 15-108 | Reclassification of Labeling Act of 2023
laws.status_basis: The act standardizes congressional labeling conventions and does not direct any U.S. Code amendment.
laws.required_code_treatment: Keep only a concise historical note; do not insert operative Code text.
laws.recommended_action: Retain the law as a concise archival note and do not synthesize a Code entry.
laws.chronology_conclusion: The source text governs internal legislative labeling only, so the proper codification treatment is history-only rather than a Code rewrite.

laws.title: Public Law 15-109 | Ending Tigray for the Last Time
laws.status_basis: The joint resolution repeals the formal notice of war against the Republic of Tigray and does not direct a U.S. Code amendment.
laws.required_code_treatment: Keep only a concise repeal-history note; do not insert operative Code text.
laws.recommended_action: Retain the resolution as a concise historical note and do not invent a Code citation.
laws.chronology_conclusion: The source text is a repeal-history resolution, so the proper treatment is archival history rather than a live U.S. Code rewrite.

provisions.text_summary: Repeals the formal notice of war previously associated with House Joint Resolution 6.
provisions.exact_change: No U.S. Code change is authorized.
provisions.notes: The resolution operates as repeal history only.
